case_title: ZIPCAR, INC. VS. SERGIO GARCIA JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100028442), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZIPCAR, INC. SERVED DEC-02-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE DEC-06-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA JR, SERGIO AKA SERGIO ANTONIO GARCIA, JR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIPCAR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA JR, SERGIO AKA SERGIO ANTONIO GARCIA, JR. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,583.33 INTEREST, $313.15 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,246.48, SEE SCANNED DOC
